headline: U.S. Bancorp Completes BTIG Buyout, Expands Capital Markets Platform
summary: USB completes BTIG buyout, adding equity trading, equity capital markets and M&A advisory to expand its capital markets platform and fee-based revenue mix.

raw.headline: U.S. Bancorp Completes BTIG Buyout, Expands Capital Markets Platform
raw.summary: USB completes BTIG buyout, adding equity trading, equity capital markets and M&A advisory to expand its capital markets platform and fee-based revenue mix.

headline: Ares Management: Bonds Might Still Offer The Best Deal
summary: Ares Management continues to post strong capital inflows and asset growth, but recent fundraising momentum may not be sustainable. Click for more on ARES stock.

headline: Invesco Completes Canadian Fund Sale as CI GAM Expands Scale
summary: IVZ completes transfer of the C$27B Canadian fund business to CI GAM, while retaining portfolio roles on 61 funds through a long-term partnership.

raw.headline: Invesco Completes Canadian Fund Sale as CI GAM Expands Scale
raw.summary: IVZ completes transfer of the C$27B Canadian fund business to CI GAM, while retaining portfolio roles on 61 funds through a long-term partnership.

headline: KKR Milan Office Opens As Italy Focus Meets Valuation Opportunity
summary: KKR (NYSE:KKR) has announced the opening of a new office in Milan to expand its local presence and investment activity in Italy. The move includes the relocation of key leadership to Milan, highlighting the importance of the Italian market for the firm. The new office is intended to support deeper relationships with Italian companies, financial institutions, and other local stakeholders. For investors tracking NYSE:KKR, the Milan office comes at a time when the stock is trading around...
